name: schema-registry-dag-dag-topology-builder
description: T197 DagTopologyBuilder — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Builds visual/traversal topology from DAG adjacency records. Produces ordered node list for visualization.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: triggered by DagRebuildCompleted event, builds from adjacency records not inline, produces ordered node list, stores topology record
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern + dag-topology-build + adjacency-to-ordered-list + visualization-topology patterns for T197
Break T197 into: consume DagRebuildCompleted → load adjacency records from DATABASE → topological sort → produce ordered node list → store DagTopology document → ready for T199 reads

Generate dag-topology-builder.service.ts — @EventPattern('DagRebuildCompleted'), reads adjacency records from DATABASE (not computes inline), performs topological sort for ordered node list, stores DagTopology document with ordered nodes and edge list. DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE any downstream emit. Output consumed by T199 DagRenderGateway.
Named check validation: event_pattern_dag_rebuild_completed, reads_adjacency_from_db, topological_sort_performed, ordered_node_list_produced, store_before_downstream
Score generated code 0-100 against T197 iron rules: event-driven entry, adjacency-based build, topological ordering, DNA-8 compliance
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=event-driven+adjacency-read+topological-sort+store-before-emit, rejected=inline-topology-compute OR http-triggered OR unordered-node-list. curriculumTier=1.
